calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-26-2020 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-04-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Camille Perna appeared by zoom for Eric Huddleston (Petitioner).

The Court questions why this estate should pay for recording of the death of the joint tenant when the Personal Representative was the other joint tenant. Ms. Perna stated that the Court can remove those costs. The Court also questions why fees paid to a messenger service are appropriate. Ms. Perna stated that they were having trouble, and that they were mailing paper copies of documents, but the papers were not getting delivered and so they used a messenger service. The Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.
